files.note: 5-hook integration, useVirtualizer, _verifyGridLicenseStub, data-row/col attributes, D9 composition chain
Added @tanstack/react-virtual optional peerDep (C-22 compliance, D3 spec defect resolution)

specCodeDefects.defect: useCellRange called with options object {rowCount, colCount, onRangeChange, disabled} — actual hook signature is useCellRange(onRangeChange?: callback) with single optional callback argument. Spec template incorrect.
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Called as useCellRange(enableRangeSelection ? onRangeChange : undefined) matching actual useCellRange.ts signature. Mouse event gating done at component level via enableRangeSelection check in renderCells L231-237.

specCodeDefects.defect: DragFillHandle render shows getCellValue={getCellValue ?? (() => undefined)} but DragFillHandleProps.getCellValue is non-optional — type would error if getCellValue undefined.
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Render condition changed to: enableDragFill && range !== null && getCellValue !== undefined (L340). DragFillHandle not rendered when getCellValue undefined (EC-001 behavior).

specCodeDefects.specLocation: G-006-spec.md Section 3.2 L214-225 getCellRect + data-row/col requirement
specCodeDefects.defect: getCellRect uses querySelector('[data-row]...[data-col]...') but existing RangeSelectGrid.tsx (G-001) does not emit data-row/data-col attributes on <td> elements.
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Added data-row={rowIdx} data-col={colIdx} attributes to all <td> elements in renderCells L219-220 (Section 5.1 spec tree shows tr[data-row=r] + td[data-row=r][data-col=c]).

specCodeDefects.defect: useVirtualizer called with enabled: enableVirtualization option — @tanstack/react-virtual v3 does not have an 'enabled' option in useVirtualizer.
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Used count: enableVirtualization ? rowCount : 0 (L191) to disable virtualization (count=0 produces empty virtualRows). 'enabled' option removed.

promptSpecDrift.specValue: C-22: peerDependencies required for @tanstack/react-virtual (useVirtualizer import). Section 9 risk table notes 'C-22 정책 검토 필요'
promptSpecDrift.resolution: C-22 constraint applied — @tanstack/react-virtual added as optional peerDep. D3 interpreted as 'no license/EULA change needed' (the intent), not 'no peerDep addition allowed'.

surgicalChangeVerification.note: External monorepo — git tracking N/A (ADR-MOD-GRID-00-001). Glob + Read + tsc verification used. Worktree decisions.md in TOMIS git verified.

RangeSelectGridAllProps appended L186-200 (no existing interfaces modified).
surgicalChangeVerification.indexPreserved: G-001~G-005 exports (L8-38) preserved. RangeSelectGridAllProps added to type exports L9 (single line, no existing lines removed).
surgicalChangeVerification.rangeSelectGridPreserved: G-001 base structure preserved: table render L256-335, header L258-288, body L290-335, loading state L199-207, emptyText L297. New: data-row/col L219-220, tabIndex/onKeyDown L250-252, 5 hook calls L133-173, DragFillHandle L340-351, useVirtualizer L190-196, virtualization render branch L300-334.

feedback.summary: G-006 capstone: 8 spec files + package.json (C-22). tsc 0 errors (both packages). tsup 14.22 KB ESM / ~5.3 KB gzipped estimate. 4 spec code defects found and corrected. 1 prompt-spec drift (D3 vs C-22 peerDep) resolved per C-22. D9 composition chain functional. D5 Rules of Hooks enforced. C-29 spread-skip pattern compliant.
feedback.drift: 1 prompt-spec drift: D3 'package.json unchanged' vs C-22 peerDep obligation for @tanstack/react-virtual useVirtualizer import. Resolved per C-22 constraint (optional peerDep added). D3 interpreted as EULA-only, not peerDep-exclusion.
feedback.defects: 4 spec code defects self-corrected by Implementer: (1) useCellRange signature HIGH — actual hook single param, not object. (2) DragFillHandle getCellValue fallback MEDIUM — added render condition. (3) data-row/col missing MEDIUM — added to <td>. (4) useVirtualizer 'enabled' MEDIUM — used count=0 for disable. All in specCodeDefects[].
items: spec L228-233 useCellRange({rowCount,colCount,...}) 시그니처 불일치 자율 정정 — 실제 useCellRange(callback?) 단일 인자. L133-135 correct pattern applied.
spec L388-390 DragFillHandle getCellValue fallback 타입 오류 자율 정정 — getCellValue !== undefined 렌더 조건 L340 사용 (no fallback).
spec L214-225 querySelector data-row/col attribute 누락 자율 정정 — <td data-row={rowIdx} data-col={colIdx}> L219-220 추가.
spec L283-288 useVirtualizer enabled 옵션 미존재 자율 정정 — count: enableVirtualization ? rowCount : 0 L191 사용.
D4 enable* 5개: enableRangeSelection/enableKeyboardNav/enableDragFill/enableClipboard/enableKeyboardEdit/enableVirtualization. 모두 동작 게이팅, hook 호출 게이팅 아님 (D5).
D5 Rules of Hooks: 5개 hook 전부 무조건 호출 (L133, L140, L155, L166, L190). DragFillHandle은 컴포넌트이므로 조건부 렌더 L340 허용.
D9 onKeyDown 체인: editKeyDown → navKeyDown → clipKeyDown (L176-185, e.defaultPrevented early return 포함).
C-29 spread-skip: getCellValue L146, onPaste L161-162, onClipboardError L162, onDeleteRange L170, onBulkEdit L171, onEditStart L172, onFillComplete L348, onFillTargetChange L349 모두 spread-skip 패턴.
useVirtualizer 가상화: count=0 (enableVirtualization=false) → virtualRows=null → 일반 tbody.map() 렌더 fallback L326-333.
noop pattern: L139 useCallback((_r: CellRange | null) => undefined) for type-safe early return in useKeyboardNav onRangeChange when enableKeyboardNav=false.
